2604.03094.title: A Data-Centric Vision Transformer Baseline for SAR Sea Ice Classification
2604.03094.paper_summary: Accurate and automated sea ice classification is important for climate monitoring and maritime safety in the Arctic. While Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) is the operational standard because of its all-weather capability, it remains challenging to distinguish morphologically similar ice classes under severe class imbalance. Rather than claiming a fully validated multimodal system, this paper establishes a trustworthy SAR only baseline that future fusion work can build upon. Using the AI4Arctic/ASIP Sea Ice Dataset (v2), which contains 461 Sentinel-1 scenes matched with expert ice charts, we combine full-resolution Sentinel-1 Extra Wide inputs, leakage-aware stratified patch splitting, SIGRID-3 stage-of-development labels, and training-set normalization to evaluate Vision Transformer baselines. We compare ViT-Base models trained with cross entropy and weighted cross-entropy against a ViT-Large model trained with focal loss. Among the tested configurations, ViT-Large with focal loss achieves 69.6% held-out accuracy, 68.8% weighted F1, and 83.9% precision on the minority Multi-Year Ice class. These results show that focal-loss training offers a more useful precision-recall trade-off than weighted cross-entropy for rare ice classes and establishes a cleaner baseline for future multimodal fusion with optical, thermal, or meteorological data.
2604.03094.paper_summary_zh: 精確且自動化的海冰分類對於北極的氣候監測和海事安全至關重要。雖然合成孔徑雷達（SAR）因其全天候能力而成為操作標準，但在嚴重的類別不平衡下，區分形態相似的冰類仍然具有挑戰性。本文並未聲稱建立一個完全驗證的多模態系統，而是建立了一個值得信賴的僅基於SAR的基線，未來的融合工作可以在此基礎上進行。利用AI4Arctic/ASIP海冰數據集（v2），該數據集包含461個與專家冰圖匹配的Sentinel-1場景，我們結合全分辨率的Sentinel-1超寬輸入、考慮洩漏的分層補丁拆分、SIGRID-3發展階段標籤和訓練集正規化來評估Vision Transformer基線。我們比較了使用交叉熵和加權交叉熵訓練的ViT-Base模型與使用焦點損失訓練的ViT-Large模型。在測試的配置中，使用焦點損失的ViT-Large達到69.6%的保留準確率、68.8%的加權F1和83.9%的少數多年度冰類的精確度。這些結果顯示，焦點損失訓練對於稀有冰類提供了比加權交叉熵更有用的精確度-召回率權衡，並為未來與光學、熱或氣象數據的多模態融合建立了更乾淨的基線。
2604.03094.author: David Mike-Ewewie et.al.
2604.03094.authors: David Mike-Ewewie, Panhapiseth Lim, Priyanka Kumar
